description.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术壁挂火炬，带有闪烁的泪滴形火焰、木质手柄、护手和墙壁支架。实现IMultiOutputNode以提供独立的图像和遮罩输出端口。
description.en: Generates a pixel-art wall-mount torch with a flickering teardrop flame, wooden handle, cross-guard, and wall bracket. Implements IMultiOutputNode for separate image and mask ports.

triggers.zh-Hans: 火炬, 火把, 火焰, 照明, 壁挂火炬, 地牢灯光
triggers.en: torch, fire, flame, wall torch, light source, dungeon

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术壁挂火炬，用于地牢或城堡场景的环境装饰。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art wall-mount torches for dungeon or castle scene environment decoration.
